title: Christmas Poinsettia Candle Ring with Pine Cones and Glitter Berries 20cm
features: Elevate your holiday décor with our exquisite Christmas poinsettia candle ring, measuring a generous 20cm in diameter.
This stunning piece features a harmonious blend of lush pine cones, vibrant gold glitter berries, and delicate flowers, creating a festive centrepiece that captures the essence of the season.
The rich colours and textures not only enhance the ambiance of your home but also provide a warm, inviting atmosphere for family gatherings and celebrations.

Perfect for adorning your favourite candles, this candle ring adds a touch of elegance to your holiday table settings or mantelpiece, making it an essential addition to your seasonal décor collection.
Celebrate the spirit of Christmas with this beautifully crafted accessory that is sure to impress your guests and bring joy to your festivities.
